parameters.query: SELECT p.id AS projeto_id, p.nome AS projeto, p.responsavel AS responsavel_projeto, p.status AS status_projeto, p.prazo, t.id AS tarefa_id, t.titulo AS tarefa, t.responsavel AS responsavel_tarefa, t.status AS status_tarefa FROM projetos p LEFT JOIN tarefas t ON t.projeto_id = p.id WHERE p.status != 'CONCLUÍDO' ORDER BY p.prazo ASC NULLS LAST, p.id, t.id;
INSERT INTO analises (conteudo) VALUES ('{{ JSON.stringify($json.analise) }}'::jsonb) RETURNING id;

parameters.jsCode:
const analise = $('Parsear Resposta').first().json.analise;
return [{ json: { success: true, data: analise } }];
